# King EPCM

> King EPCM is a full-service civil, environmental, and geotechnical engineering firm based in Markham, Ontario, Canada. Established in 2019, it takes land development projects from planning through approval across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) and Golden Horseshoe, and provides mining and aggregate engineering across Canada. Work is delivered by professional engineers (P.Eng). Motto: Flexible. Dependable. On-site Engineering.

## Company facts

- Name: King EPCM
- Founded: 2019
- Headquarters: 3780 14th Avenue, Unit 211, Markham, ON L3R 9Y5, Canada
- Phone: +1 416-342-3001
- Email: info@kingepcm.com
- Website: https://kingepcm.com
- Service area: GTA and Golden Horseshoe (land development); Canada-wide (mining and aggregate)
- Markets served: single residential, residential subdivisions, rural/farm/vacant land, commercial subdivisions, industrial/commercial, and public agencies/governments

## Services

King EPCM offers seven engineering disciplines:

- [Chemical Environmental](https://kingepcm.com/chemical-environmental): Phase I & II Environmental Site Assessments (ESA), contamination assessment, soil & groundwater testing, and remediation support.
- [Natural Heritage Environmental](https://kingepcm.com/natural-heritage-environmental): environmental impact studies, ecological & tree surveys, natural heritage evaluations, and regulatory compliance.
- [Civil & Municipal Design](https://kingepcm.com/civil-municipal-design): grading & drainage, stormwater management, site servicing, engineered septic design, and floodplain modelling.
- [Geotechnical & Hydrogeology](https://kingepcm.com/geotechnical-hydrogeology): soil investigations, bearing capacity & SPT testing, foundation recommendations, groundwater studies, dewatering, and water-taking permits.
- [Survey & Inspections](https://kingepcm.com/survey-inspections): topographic surveys, construction inspections, site monitoring, and asphalt & concrete QA/QC.
- [Permit & Project Management](https://kingepcm.com/permit-project-management): ECA, PTTW, septic & site-alteration permits, approvals coordination, and project delivery.
- [Mining & Aggregate](https://kingepcm.com/mining-aggregate): NI 43-101 resource statements, feasibility studies, open-pit & underground design, and Aggregate Resources Act (ARA) work.

## Contact

To request a quote, call +1 416-342-3001, email sales@kingepcm.com, or use the form at https://kingepcm.com/contact. For general inquiries, email info@kingepcm.com.
